questions.question: What is the primary cause of waterborne diseases?
questions.explanation: Contaminated water is the primary cause of waterborne diseases.

questions.question: Which of the following waterborne diseases is caused by the parasite Giardia?
questions.explanation: Giardiasis is a waterborne disease caused by the parasite Giardia.

questions.question: What is the name of the disease caused by consuming water contaminated with arsenic?
questions.explanation: Arsenic poisoning is the name of the disease caused by consuming water contaminated with arsenic.

questions.question: Which of the following is a water-induced disease?
questions.explanation: Drought is a water-induced disease, as it is caused by a lack of water.

questions.question: What is the name of the disease caused by a lack of access to clean water?
questions.explanation: Chronic kidney disease is a disease caused by a lack of access to clean water.
